/usr/bin/c++  -Wno-deprecated CMakeFiles/engine.dir/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/tinyXML/tinyxml2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/utils/Figure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/utils/Config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/utils/Group.cpp.o -o engine  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglut.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXmu.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXi.so
